name: eos-monorepo
description: Repo-root for ESLint config and dev tooling. Each sub-package (contracts/, core/, infra/, gateway/, spawner/, manager/, app/ui/) has its own deps.

scripts.lint: eslint contracts/src/ core/src/ infra/src/ manager/cli.ts manager/cli/ manager/daemon.ts manager/container.ts manager/routes/ manager/middleware/ manager/sse/ manager/orchestrator-mcp.ts manager/orchestrator-mcp/ manager/worker-mcp.ts manager/worker-mcp/ manager/backends/ manager/commands/ manager/tools/ manager/prompt-tool-names.ts manager/tool-descriptions.ts manager/shared/ manager/builder/ spawner/ gateway/ app/ui/src/
